data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for location-specific variants.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Location-specific variants where needed', but the provided evidence does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the existence or correctness of these variants. The prior steps focus on bookings and member interactions, lacking any direct reference to location-specific configurations or their validation. This indicates a gap in the validation process for the specified requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of validation for location-specific variants.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and correctness of location-specific variants.
